title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Malabar Gold & Diamonds

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Malabar Gold & Diamonds
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Malabar Gold & Diamonds in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
